title: Invest Like Warren Buffett With These ETFs
text: Buffett's company Berkshire Hathaway's latest 13-F filing showed that Berkshire's portfolio was invested in 49 companies in the fourth quarter of 2022.

title: Warren Buffett Didn't Buy a Single New Stock to End 2022. But He Cut From 8.
text: Buffett's company Berkshire Hathaway spent more time selling stocks than buying in the fourth quarter of 2022.

title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway slashed 3 big stock bets last quarter - and topped up its huge Apple stake
text: Buffett's company pared its wagers on Taiwan Semiconductor, BNY Mellon, and US Bancorp last quarter, and also trimmed its Activision Blizzard stake.

title: BNY Mellon to Speak at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference
text: NEW YORK , Feb. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation ("BNY Mellon") (NYSE: BK) announced today that Robin Vince, President and Chief Executive Officer, will speak at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference, in New York, at 4:00 p.m. ET on Tuesday, March 7, 2023.

title: Warren Buffett owns a little-known stock portfolio worth nearly $6 billion. These are the portfolio's top 10 stock holdings.
text: The portfolio is managed by New England Asset Management, which was acquired by Berkshire Hathaway in 1998 through its $22 billion General Re buyout.

title: Warren Buffett May Have Recently Sold These 2 Stocks Again -- and Not for the Reason You Think
text: Buffett's company, Berkshire Hathaway, will soon reveal what stocks it bought and sold in the fourth quarter of 2022.

title: The 7 Best Beaten-Down Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy
text: When it comes to Warren Buffett stocks to buy, the quintessential purchase is Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B ). After all, when you buy shares in Berkshire, you not only get a bunch of great operating businesses like BNSF Railway, Geico, Berkshire Energy and so many more, but you also get an equity portfolio currently worth more than $350.5 billion.

title: Why The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) have what it takes?
